title: FruitFam
description: Explore unique biomes, epic dungeons, and enhanced gameplay! Join by subscribing to Peachuri on Twitch and connecting through the FruitFam Discord to access the Minecraft server.
body:
## FruitFam Modpack  

Experience Minecraft like never before with the **FruitFam Modpack**, designed for both the FruitFam Minecraft server and single-player adventures. This modpack brings a perfect balance of exploration, adventure, and quality-of-life improvements to elevate your gameplay.  

### **Features at a Glance**  
- **Overhauled World Generation:**  
  - Biomes O' Plenty  
  - Incendium  
  - Nullscape  
  - Yung's Better X  
- **Optimized Performance:** Shader support for stunning visuals.  
- **Enhanced Strongholds & Fortresses:** Redesigned for more engaging exploration.  
- **New Bosses and Mobs:** Includes Bosses of Mass Destruction and Adventurez.  
- **Hundreds of New Structures:** Featuring Yung's Better Dungeons and AdoraBuild: Structures.  
- **Quality-of-Life Enhancements:** Waystones, Tom's Storage, and Xaero's Minimap with added features.  
- **Massive Mod Collection:** Over 160 curated mods for an unforgettable experience.  

### **Why Choose the FruitFam Modpack?**  
This modpack caters to adventurers, builders, and explorers alike. Whether you're diving into uncharted biomes, conquering fierce bosses, or unraveling the secrets of newly added dungeons, the FruitFam Modpack ensures endless hours of immersive gameplay. Quality-of-life features like fast travel and improved storage streamline your experience, letting you focus on what matters most—adventure!  

### **Compatibility and Requirements**  
Optimized for Minecraft **1.21.1**, this modpack delivers enhanced visuals and smooth performance with shader support. A modern system is recommended for the best experience.  

### **Join the FruitFam Community (18+ Only)**  
Originally created for the FruitFam server, this modpack is now open to all adventurers. Take your Minecraft experience to the next level and join a vibrant community!  

**How to Join:**  
1. Subscribe to [Peachuri on Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/peachuri).  
2. Join the [FruitFam Discord Server](https://discord.gg/fruitfam) to get the role required to access the server.  

Dive into a world of endless possibilities with the FruitFam Modpack!
